meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Master professional SaaS delivery with this expert checklist. Bridge the gap between client vision and technical execution using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Eliminate the 'no-SaaS-knowledge' barrier by standardizing your delivery pipeline. Use Antigravity to scaffold production-grade architectures and Claude Code for rapid, iterative feature implementation. By automating technical boilerplate, you shift your focus from writing syntax to delivering high-value business logic that impresses clients and ensures recurring revenue.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. Your client has a brilliant vision for a platform, but they don't know an API from an SDK. They are paralyzed by the technical debt of their own ambition, and you are the one standing between their dream and a graveyard of half-baked prototypes. The friction isn't the code; it's the lack of a repeatable, professional delivery framework.

Stop reinventing the wheel on every project. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for surgical, context-aware development, you transform from a struggling freelancer into a high-velocity SaaS architect. This is how you ship faster, charge more, and turn technical ambiguity into a recurring revenue stream.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the project scope using a structured schema to ensure the foundation supports future scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust SaaS boilerplate using Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include authentication, role-based access control, and a Stripe integration skeleton.

steps.title: Contextual Requirement Mapping
steps.description: Translate non-technical client feedback into actionable technical tasks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these client user stories and map them to database schema requirements and API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'review requirements.txt and update schema.prisma'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Utilize Claude Code to build out specific UI components based on your wireframes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive dashboard component that fetches data from the Supabase API and displays it in a Shadcn UI table.

steps.title: Automated Testing & QA
steps.description: Ensure the product is production-ready by automating unit tests for critical paths.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests for the checkout flow and user authentication cycle.

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Configure an automated CI/CD pipeline so the client can see progress in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions pipeline to deploy this project to Vercel upon every push to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always use a 'Client Translation Layer' file in your repo; keep technical jargon out of it so clients can read the progress log.
Implement a 'feature flag' system early; it allows you to toggle unfinished features without breaking the live demo for clients.
Use Claude Code to generate your README documentation automatically after every major sprint to keep clients informed.
Never hardcode environment variables; use an encrypted vault integration that Antigravity supports to keep client credentials secure.
Standardize your git commit messages using a conventional format so you can generate professional changelogs for your clients in seconds.
content.next_steps: Once the foundation is set, focus on implementing a recurring billing cycle and setting up a client-facing status dashboard to ensure long-term maintenance contracts.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start architecting the future of your freelance business. With this workflow, you aren't just a coder; you are a strategic partner. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
